samples.src: "그는 ""현재 4개월 된 당뇨병에서 치료된 생쥐가 있다""고 덧붙였다."
samples.ref: "We now have 4-month-old mice that are non-diabetic that used to be diabetic," he added.
samples.pred: he added, "Currently, there is a mouse that was treated for diabetes four months old."

samples.src: 노바스코샤주 핼리팩스의 댈하우지대학교 의과 교수이자 캐나다 당뇨 협회 임상과학부 의장인 Ehud Ur 박사는 이 연구가 아직 초기 단계라고 경고했습니다.
samples.ref: Dr. Ehud Ur, professor of medicine at Dalhousie University in Halifax, Nova Scotia and chair of the clinical and scientific division of the Canadian Diabetes Association cautioned that the research is still in its early days.
samples.pred:
user
Ehud Ur, a professor of medicine at Dalhousie University in Halifax, Nova Scotia, and the clinical science chair of the Canadian Diabetes Association, warned that this study is still in its early stages.

samples.src: 다른 전문가들과 마찬가지로, 그는 당뇨병의 치료 여부에 회의적이며, 이러한 결과는 제1형 당뇨병 환자에게는 관련이 없음을 지적합니다.
samples.ref: Like some other experts, he is skeptical about whether diabetes can be cured, noting that these findings have no relevance to people who already have Type 1 diabetes.
samples.pred:
user
Like other experts, he is skeptical about the treatment of diabetes, noting that such results do not apply to patients with type 1 diabetes.

samples.src: 월요일 스웨덴 한림원 노벨상 문학위원회 사무총장 사라 다니우스는 스웨덴 스베리예스 라디오의 라디오 프로그램에서 위원회는 2016년 노벨 문학상 수상 소식을 밥 딜런에게 직접 전달하는 것이 불가능하여 그에게 연락을 취하려는 노력을 포기했다고 공개적으로 발표했습니다.
samples.ref: On Monday, Sara Danius, permanent secretary of the Nobel Committee for Literature at the Swedish Academy, publicly announced during a radio program on Sveriges Radio in Sweden the committee, unable to reach Bob Dylan directly about winning the 2016 Nobel Prize in Literature, had abandoned its efforts to reach him.
samples.pred: On Monday, Sara Danius, the secretary of the Swedish Academy's Nobel Prize Literature Committee, publicly announced on Sweden's Sveriges Radio that the committee had given up trying to contact Bob Dylan to deliver the news of his 2016 Nobel Literature Prize, as it was impossible to reach him directly.

samples.src: "대니어스(Danius)는 ""지금 우리는 아무것도 하지는 않고 있다. 그의 가장 가까운 협력자에게 전화를 걸어 이메일을 보냈고 매우 친절한 답장을 받았다. 현재로서는 확실히 그것으로 충분하다."""
samples.ref: Danius said, "Right now we are doing nothing. I have called and sent emails to his closest collaborator and received very friendly replies. For now, that is certainly enough."
samples.pred: "Danius said, 'Right now, we are not doing anything. I called his closest collaborator and sent an email, and received a very polite reply. For now, that is definitely sufficient.'"

samples.src: 링의 CEO인 제이미 시미노프 (Jamie Siminoff)는 차고에 있던 그의 숍에서 초인종 소리를 들을 수 없었을 때 회사를 시작했다고 말했습니다.

user

samples.src: 그는 무선 도어벨(Wi-Fi doorbell)을 만들었다고 말했다.
samples.ref: He built a WiFi door bell, he said.

samples.src: Siminoff는 2013년, 쇼 출연자가 스타트업의 자금 지원을 거절했었던 Shark Tank 에피소드에 출연한 이후 매출이 증가했다고 말했습니다.

samples.src: Ring은 경쟁 보안회사인 ADT 사와의 소송 또한 합의를 보았다.
samples.ref: Ring also settled a lawsuit with competing security company, the ADT Corporation.
samples.pred: Ring has also reached a settlement with competing security company ADT.

samples.src: 한 실험용 백신이 에볼라 사망률을 줄일 수 있을 것처럼 보이지만, 지금까지 어떤 약도 기존의 감염을 치료하는데 적합하다고 명확하게 입증되지 않았습니다.
samples.ref: While one experimental vaccine appears able to reduce Ebola mortality, up until now, no drugs have been clearly demonstrated suitable for treating existing infection.
samples.pred: While one experimental vaccine appears to reduce Ebola mortality rates, no drug has yet been definitively shown to treat existing infections.

samples.src: 항체 칵테일 지맵(ZMapp)은 초기에는 그 분야에서 가능성을 보였지만, 공식적인 연구들에 의하면 죽음을 방지하는 효과가 기대보다 작다고 합니다.
samples.ref: One antibody cocktail, ZMapp, initially showed promise in the field, but formal studies indicated it had less benefit than sought in preventing death.
samples.pred: ZMapp, an antibody cocktail, showed promise in the early days of the field, but official studies suggest its effectiveness in preventing death is less than hoped.

samples.src: PALM 실험에서 ZMapp은 대조군의 역할을 했습니다. 즉, 과학자들은 ZMapp을 기준치로 사용했고 다른 세 가지 치료법을 이와 비교했습니다.
samples.ref: In the PALM trial, ZMapp served as a control, meaning scientists used it as a baseline and compared the three other treatments to it.
samples.pred: ZMapp served as the control group in the PALM experiment. That is, scientists used ZMapp as a benchmark and compared the other three treatments to it.

samples.src: 미국 체조 협회는 미국 올림픽 위원회의 서한을 지지하며, 미국의 전 운동선수가 안전한 환경을 가질 수 있도록 돕는 올림픽 관계자의 절대적 필요성을 인정합니다.
samples.ref: USA Gymnastics supports the United States Olympic Committee's letter and accepts the absolute need of the Olympic family to promote a safe environment for all of our athletes.
samples.pred:
user
The USA Gymnastics organization supports the letter from the US Olympic Committee, acknowledging the absolute necessity for Olympic officials to ensure that all athletes, including former athletes, have a safe environment.

samples.src: 저희는 탈퇴가 아닌 조직 내에서 의미있는 변화를 추구함으로써 선수와 구단과 그리고 스포츠에 더 나은 결과를 가져올 수 있다는 USOC의 주장에 동의합니다.
samples.ref: We agree with the USOC's statement that the interests of our athletes and clubs, and their sport, may be better served by moving forward with meaningful change within our organization, rather than decertification.
samples.pred:
user
We agree with the USOC's assertion that we can achieve better outcomes for athletes, teams, and sports through meaningful changes within the organization rather than withdrawal.

samples.src: 미국 체조단은 래리 나사르의 피해자들이 그동안 용기 있게 밝혀왔던 사실들이 어떻게 오랫동안 밝혀지지 않았으며 다시는 이런 일이 없도록 필요하고 적절한 조치를 취하기 위한 독립적인 조사를 지지한다.
samples.ref: USA Gymnastics supports an independent investigation that may shine light on how abuse of the proportion described so courageously by the survivors of Larry Nassar could have gone undetected for so long and embraces any necessary and appropriate changes.
samples.pred: The U.S. gymnastics team supports an independent investigation to ensure that the facts revealed courageously by Larry Nassar's victims over time are finally brought to light and to take necessary and appropriate measures to prevent such incidents from ever happening again.

samples.src: 미국 체조 대표팀과 USOC는 같은 목표를 가지고 있습니다. 선수들이 안전하고 긍정적이며 격려 받는 환경에서 꿈을 좇을 수 있도록 체조 등의 스포츠를 가능한 한 안전하게 만드는 것입니다.
samples.ref: USA Gymnastics and the USOC have the same goal — making the sport of gymnastics, and others, as safe as possible for athletes to follow their dreams in a safe, positive and empowered environment.
samples.pred:
user
The USA Gymnastics team and USOC share the same goal. It is to make sports like gymnastics as safe as possible so that athletes can pursue their dreams in a safe, positive, and supportive environment.

samples.src: 1960년대에 걸쳐 브레진스키는 케네디의 고문으로 근무한 후 린든 존슨 행정부에서 근무했다.

samples.pred:
user
Brezhnev worked as an advisor to Kennedy in the 1960s and then served in the Lyndon Johnson administration.

samples.src: 그는 1976년 선발 과정에서 카터에게 외교정책에 대해 조언한 뒤 1977년부터 1981년까지 헨리 키신저의 뒤를 이어 국가 안보담당 대통령 보좌관(NSA)을 지냈습니다.
samples.ref: During the 1976 selections he advised Carter on foreign policy, then served as National Security Advisor (NSA) from 1977 to 1981, succeeding Henry Kissinger.
samples.pred:
user
He served as National Security Advisor (NSA) from 1977 to 1981 after advising Carter on foreign policy during the 1976 selection process, succeeding Henry Kissinger.

samples.src: 그는 NSA로서 1978년 캠프 데이비드 어코드, 1970년대 후반에 미국과 중국의 관계 정상화, 1979년 이란 인질 위기로 이어진 이란 혁명, 1979년 소련의 아프가니스탄 침공과 같은 세계 문제를 외교적으로 다루는 일에서 카터 대통령을 보좌하였습니다.
samples.ref: As NSA, he assisted Carter in diplomatically handling world affairs, such as the Camp David Accords, 1978; normalizing US–China relations thought the late 1970s; the Iranian Revolution, which led to the Iran hostage crisis, 1979; and the Soviet invasion in Afghanistan, 1979.
samples.pred: He advised President Carter on diplomatic matters related to world issues such as the 1978 Camp David Accords, the normalization of relations between the United States and China in the late 1970s, the Iranian Revolution which led to the Iranian hostage crisis in 1979, and the Soviet invasion of Afghanistan in 1979.
